description: 心跳 platformStatus:DEGRADED → FSM 切 DEGRADED;不暂停 Kafka(仍接派单,只是平台示意降级,后续可据 desiredMaxConcurrent 收敛)。enum 已有 DEGRADED 值(worker_runtime_states),本 fixture 驱动决策核产出 fsmTransition:DEGRADED 并断言不 pause(kafka:none)。

then.sdkExpectedAction: transition FSM to DEGRADED; keep accepting tasks (do not pause Kafka assignment)
